generator.name: VLM Prompt Framework — Public Safety & Security Surveillance

domain.label: Public Safety & Security Surveillance
domain.description: Comprehensive domain for real-time VLM-powered surveillance covering vehicles, crowds, perimeter integrity, environmental compliance and behavioural threat indicators

incident_classes.label: Vehicle Incidents
incident_classes.description: All incidents primarily involving motor vehicles — unattended, abandoned, misplaced

incident_classes.label: Crowd and Pedestrian Incidents
incident_classes.description: All incidents involving groups of people — density, flow, conflict

incident_classes.label: Physical Security Perimeter Incidents
incident_classes.description: All incidents involving the integrity of physical security boundaries

incident_classes.label: Illegal Dumping and Environmental Incidents
incident_classes.description: All incidents involving unauthorised disposal of waste or hazardous materials

incident_classes.label: Behavioural and Pre-Incident Indicators
incident_classes.description: Behavioural signals that may precede a serious incident

it_unattended_vehicle.label: Unattended Vehicle
it_unattended_vehicle.description: A vehicle present in a location where unattended vehicles pose an operational or security risk, with no driver or authorised attendant visible

signals.label: Prolonged Stationary Vehicle
signals.description: Vehicle has not moved for longer than the contextually normal dwell time

signals.label: Unattended Vehicle in Restricted Zone
signals.description: Vehicle parked or stopped in a zone where unattended vehicles are prohibited

it_abandoned_vehicle.label: Abandoned Vehicle
it_abandoned_vehicle.description: A vehicle exhibiting physical or contextual evidence of permanent or long-term abandonment, representing an environmental, security or operational hazard

signals.label: Vehicle Showing Abandonment Indicators
signals.description: Structural, surface or contextual signs of abandonment (flat tyres, debris accumulation, damage)

signals.label: Prolonged Stationary Vehicle
signals.description: Vehicle has not moved for longer than the contextually normal dwell time

signals.label: Missing or Obscured License Plates
signals.description: Vehicle has no visible registration plates or plates are deliberately obscured

it_vehicle_wrong_zone.label: Vehicle in Prohibited Zone
it_vehicle_wrong_zone.description: Vehicle present in an area where its class, size or operational status is prohibited by regulation

signals.label: Oversized or Non-Conforming Vehicle in Prohibited Area
signals.description: Commercial, recreational or non-standard vehicle occupying a disallowed zone

signals.label: Unattended Vehicle in Restricted Zone
signals.description: Vehicle parked or stopped in a zone where unattended vehicles are prohibited

it_crowd_overcrowding.label: Overcrowding Event
it_crowd_overcrowding.description: Crowd density at a location exceeds safe occupancy thresholds

signals.label: Crowd Density Exceeding Safe Threshold
signals.description: Number of persons per unit area exceeds operationally safe limits

signals.label: Rapid Crowd Aggregation
signals.description: A group forms quickly around a focal point — may indicate altercation, collapse or attraction

it_crowd_stampede.label: Crowd Stampede or Emergency Dispersal
it_crowd_stampede.description: Rapid uncontrolled crowd movement indicating panic, emergency or forced dispersal

signals.label: Panicked or Forced Crowd Dispersal
signals.description: Sudden high-velocity outward motion of crowd — potential stampede or evacuation

it_loitering.label: Loitering in Sensitive Area
it_loitering.description: Person(s) remaining in a sensitive or restricted area without apparent legitimate purpose beyond the normal dwell threshold

signals.label: Loitering Individual or Group
signals.description: Person(s) remaining stationary in a location without apparent legitimate purpose

it_crowd_altercation.label: Altercation or Fighting
it_crowd_altercation.description: Physical conflict between individuals in a public or supervised space

signals.label: Physical Altercation or Fight
signals.description: Two or more persons engaged in physical conflict

it_crowd_management_flow.label: Crowd Flow Management Violation
it_crowd_management_flow.description: Crowd movement pattern that violates directional control or capacity management protocols

signals.label: Crowd Density Exceeding Safe Threshold
signals.description: Number of persons per unit area exceeds operationally safe limits

signals.label: Proximity Violation / Social Distancing Breach
signals.description: Inter-person spacing below mandated minimum in regulated environments

it_perimeter_breach.label: Physical Perimeter Security Breach
it_perimeter_breach.description: Unauthorised crossing of a physical security boundary

signals.label: Physical Perimeter Breach
signals.description: Person or object passing through, over or under a security barrier

it_gate_unsecured.label: Unsecured Access Point
it_gate_unsecured.description: An access control gate, door or barrier left open or unlatched without authorised attendant

signals.label: Access Gate Left Unsecured
signals.description: A controlled-access gate is open without an authorised person attending

it_tailgating.label: Tailgating at Controlled Access Point
it_tailgating.description: One or more unauthorised persons gaining facility access by following an authenticated user through a controlled entry without separate authentication

signals.label: Tailgating / Piggybacking at Access Point
signals.description: Unauthorised person follows authorised person through controlled access without independent authentication

it_camera_tampering.label: Surveillance Infrastructure Tampering
it_camera_tampering.description: Deliberate interference with surveillance cameras, lighting or intrusion sensors

signals.label: Surveillance Equipment Tampering or Obstruction
signals.description: Camera, sensor or lighting being deliberately tampered with, covered or repositioned

it_laser_illumination.label: Hostile Laser Illumination
it_laser_illumination.description: Directed laser energy aimed at personnel, aircraft, vehicles or surveillance equipment

signals.label: Directed Energy / Laser Illumination
signals.description: Visible laser beam directed at facility, equipment or personnel

it_illegal_dumping_active.label: Active Illegal Dumping
it_illegal_dumping_active.description: Real-time observation of waste being illegally deposited at an unauthorised location

signals.label: Active Illegal Dumping Behaviour
signals.description: Person or vehicle actively depositing waste material in an unauthorised location

it_illegal_dumping_evidence.label: Illegal Dumping — Evidence of Prior Event
it_illegal_dumping_evidence.description: Post-event identification of illegally deposited waste requiring investigation

signals.label: Illegal Waste Accumulation
signals.description: Pile of waste, debris or hazardous material present in an unauthorised location

signals.label: Potential Hazardous Material Dump
signals.description: Discolouration, leakage, labelling or container type suggesting hazardous content

it_suspicious_behaviour.label: Suspicious Pre-Incident Behaviour
it_suspicious_behaviour.description: Behavioural pattern consistent with pre-attack reconnaissance, target selection or attack preparation

signals.label: Reconnaissance or Pre-Attack Surveillance Behaviour
signals.description: Systematic observation, photographing or note-taking of facility infrastructure

signals.label: Deliberate Identity Concealment
signals.description: Person actively obscuring face or identity in a context where identification is expected

signals.label: Unattended or Suspicious Package
signals.description: Bag, parcel or container left unattended in a public or restricted area

it_unattended_package.label: Unattended or Suspicious Package
it_unattended_package.description: Bag, case or parcel left without an associated person in a public or restricted area

signals.label: Unattended or Suspicious Package
signals.description: Bag, parcel or container left unattended in a public or restricted area

it_person_down.label: Person Down or Medical Emergency
it_person_down.description: Individual incapacitated on the ground requiring immediate response

signals.label: Person in Distress or Incapacitated
signals.description: Individual on ground or in abnormal posture suggesting injury, illness or incapacitation

it_fire_smoke.label: Fire or Smoke Incident
it_fire_smoke.description: Active combustion or smoke event within or adjacent to a monitored facility

signals.label: Fire or Smoke Detected
signals.description: Visible flames, smoke plume or thermal signature in or near facility

it_vandalism.label: Vandalism or Property Damage
it_vandalism.description: Deliberate damage to, or unauthorised marking of, infrastructure or property

signals.label: Vandalism or Graffiti in Progress
signals.description: Person applying markings or causing damage to infrastructure surface

veh_stationary_prolonged.label: Prolonged Stationary Vehicle
veh_stationary_prolonged.description: Vehicle has not moved for longer than the contextually normal dwell time

veh_no_plates.label: Missing or Obscured License Plates
veh_no_plates.description: Vehicle has no visible registration plates or plates are deliberately obscured

veh_hazard_indicators.label: Vehicle Hazard Indicators Active
veh_hazard_indicators.description: Hazard lights flashing, possibly indicating distress or improper parking

veh_unattended_restricted.label: Unattended Vehicle in Restricted Zone
veh_unattended_restricted.description: Vehicle parked or stopped in a zone where unattended vehicles are prohibited

veh_abandoned_degraded.label: Vehicle Showing Abandonment Indicators
veh_abandoned_degraded.description: Structural, surface or contextual signs of abandonment (flat tyres, debris accumulation, damage)

veh_oversized_wrong_zone.label: Oversized or Non-Conforming Vehicle in Prohibited Area
veh_oversized_wrong_zone.description: Commercial, recreational or non-standard vehicle occupying a disallowed zone

crowd_density_threshold.label: Crowd Density Exceeding Safe Threshold
crowd_density_threshold.description: Number of persons per unit area exceeds operationally safe limits

crowd_rapid_aggregation.label: Rapid Crowd Aggregation
crowd_rapid_aggregation.description: A group forms quickly around a focal point — may indicate altercation, collapse or attraction

crowd_dispersal_stampede.label: Panicked or Forced Crowd Dispersal
crowd_dispersal_stampede.description: Sudden high-velocity outward motion of crowd — potential stampede or evacuation

crowd_loitering.label: Loitering Individual or Group
crowd_loitering.description: Person(s) remaining stationary in a location without apparent legitimate purpose

crowd_altercation.label: Physical Altercation or Fight
crowd_altercation.description: Two or more persons engaged in physical conflict

crowd_social_distancing.label: Proximity Violation / Social Distancing Breach
crowd_social_distancing.description: Inter-person spacing below mandated minimum in regulated environments

perim_fence_breach.label: Physical Perimeter Breach
perim_fence_breach.description: Person or object passing through, over or under a security barrier

perim_gate_left_open.label: Access Gate Left Unsecured
perim_gate_left_open.description: A controlled-access gate is open without an authorised person attending

perim_tailgating.label: Tailgating / Piggybacking at Access Point
perim_tailgating.description: Unauthorised person follows authorised person through controlled access without independent authentication

perim_surveillance_defeat.label: Surveillance Equipment Tampering or Obstruction
perim_surveillance_defeat.description: Camera, sensor or lighting being deliberately tampered with, covered or repositioned

perim_unauthorised_object.label: Unauthorised Object in Restricted Zone
perim_unauthorised_object.description: Object left or placed in a sterile or access-controlled area without authorisation

perim_laser_weapon.label: Directed Energy / Laser Illumination
perim_laser_weapon.description: Visible laser beam directed at facility, equipment or personnel

dump_active_offload.label: Active Illegal Dumping Behaviour
dump_active_offload.description: Person or vehicle actively depositing waste material in an unauthorised location

dump_material_accumulation.label: Illegal Waste Accumulation
dump_material_accumulation.description: Pile of waste, debris or hazardous material present in an unauthorised location

dump_hazmat_indicator.label: Potential Hazardous Material Dump
dump_hazmat_indicator.description: Discolouration, leakage, labelling or container type suggesting hazardous content

beh_concealment.label: Deliberate Identity Concealment
beh_concealment.description: Person actively obscuring face or identity in a context where identification is expected

beh_suspicious_package.label: Unattended or Suspicious Package
beh_suspicious_package.description: Bag, parcel or container left unattended in a public or restricted area

beh_surveillance_reconnaissance.label: Reconnaissance or Pre-Attack Surveillance Behaviour
beh_surveillance_reconnaissance.description: Systematic observation, photographing or note-taking of facility infrastructure

beh_weapon_indicator.label: Visible or Suspected Weapon
beh_weapon_indicator.description: Object consistent with a weapon visible or being carried

beh_person_down.label: Person in Distress or Incapacitated
beh_person_down.description: Individual on ground or in abnormal posture suggesting injury, illness or incapacitation

beh_fire_smoke.label: Fire or Smoke Detected
beh_fire_smoke.description: Visible flames, smoke plume or thermal signature in or near facility

beh_graffiti_vandalism.label: Vandalism or Graffiti in Progress
beh_graffiti_vandalism.description: Person applying markings or causing damage to infrastructure surface

quality_scorer.formula: composite = sum(score_i * weight_i for each dimension)

framework_spec.context_matrix_description: 20 canonical scene configurations spanning location type × camera angle × lighting × occlusion × crowd density × weather × time of day

prompts.system_instruction: Think step by step: is there a person down or medical emergency in this image?
prompts.user_prompt:
You are analysing a surveillance feed captured from a eye level perspective, in daylight conditions, at a urban street, during morning, with partial occlusion, crowd density: moderate. Work through the following steps:
Step 1 — Identify primary objects: List all security-relevant objects visible.
Step 2 — Match signals: Check for Person in Distress or Incapacitated.
Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show prone_or_collapsed_posture, no_self_directed_motion, bystander_attention_focused?
Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be person_resting_or_sleeping_in_designated_area, person_performing_exercise?
Step 5 — Conclude: State whether person down or medical emergency is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.
prompts.assistant_hint: Step 1: [objects]. Step 2: [signal match]. Step 3: [attributes]. Step 4: [FP check]. Step 5: [conclusion].

Step 5 — Conclude: State whether person down or medical emergency is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.

Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be person_resting_or_sleeping_in_designated_area, person_performing_exercise?
Step 5 — Conclude: State whether person down or medical emergency is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent indicating your certainty level.

Establish if you are analysing a surveillance feed captured from a eye level perspective, in daylight conditions, at a urban street, during morning, with partial occlusion, crowd density: moderate. Work through the following steps:
Step 1 — Identify primary objects: List all security-relevant objects visible.
Step 2 — Match signals: Check for Person in Distress or Incapacitated.
Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show prone_or_collapsed_posture, no_self_directed_motion, bystander_attention_focused?
Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be person_resting_or_sleeping_in_designated_area, person_performing_exercise?
Step 5 — Conclude: State whether person down or medical emergency is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent describing the spatial position using cardinal references.
hard_negative_examples: The image shows a person resting or sleeping in designated area at a urban street. Although the scene superficially resembles person down or medical emergency, the subject is engaged in a legitimate, authorised activity as evidenced by accompanying personnel with credentials. No alert is warranted.

At first glance this may appear to be person down or medical emergency, however closer inspection reveals person performing exercise. Key distinguishing features: operational context that excludes threat classification. Classification: benign / non-incident.

Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show prone_or_collapsed_posture, no_self_directed_motion, bystander_attention_focused?
Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be person_resting_or_sleeping_in_designated_area, person_performing_exercise?

prompts.reasoning_chain_template:
Step 1 — Scene inventory: List all visible objects and their approximate positions.
Step 2 — Signal check: Identify which, if any, match Person in Distress or Incapacitated.
Step 3 — Attribute confirmation: Do matched objects exhibit prone_or_collapsed_posture, no_self_directed_motion?
Step 4 — False-positive test: Could this be person resting or sleeping in designated area?
Step 5 — Verdict: Person Down or Medical Emergency is [confirmed/probable/not detected]. Confidence: [%].

vqa_answer_options.A: Yes — confirmed person down or medical emergency with visual evidence: Person in Distress or Incapacitated.
vqa_answer_options.B: No — the conditions shown are consistent with a routine, authorised operation and do not indicate person down or medical emergency.
vqa_answer_options.C: Insufficient information — key visual indicators are occluded or ambiguous, preventing a definitive classification of person down or medical emergency.
vqa_answer_options.D: Partially — some indicators of person down or medical emergency are present but do not meet the threshold for a confirmed alert; continued monitoring is recommended.

prompts.system_instruction: Think step by step: is there a fire or smoke incident in this image?
prompts.user_prompt:
You are analysing a surveillance feed captured from a eye level perspective, in daylight conditions, at a urban street, during morning, with partial occlusion, crowd density: moderate. Work through the following steps:
Step 1 — Identify primary objects: List all security-relevant objects visible.
Step 2 — Match signals: Check for Fire or Smoke Detected.
Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show smoke_plume_visual, flame_visible, thermal_bloom?
Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be steam_exhaust_from_hvac, barbecue_smoke_in_designated_area?
Step 5 — Conclude: State whether fire or smoke incident is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.

Step 4 — Confirm by matching visual attributes: large_vehicle_form_factor, non_passenger_vehicle_type, zone_signage_visible_prohibiting.

Your task is to determine whether a vehicle in prohibited zone is present. Specifically, look for: Oversized or Non-Conforming Vehicle in Prohibited Area, Unattended Vehicle in Restricted Zone. Note the presence or absence of these visual cues: large_vehicle_form_factor, non_passenger_vehicle_type, zone_signage_visible_prohibiting. If the incident is present, describe its location, the supporting evidence, and the confidence of your assessment.

prompts.system_instruction: Think step by step: is there a crowd stampede or emergency dispersal in this image?
prompts.user_prompt:
You are analysing a surveillance feed captured from a high angle perspective, in daylight conditions, at a public plaza, during afternoon, with partial occlusion, crowd density: dense. Work through the following steps:
Step 1 — Identify primary objects: List all security-relevant objects visible.
Step 2 — Match signals: Check for Panicked or Forced Crowd Dispersal.
Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show high_velocity_person_motion_vectors, centrifugal_motion_pattern, falling_persons?
Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be normal_event_end_dispersal, organised_evacuation_drill?
Step 5 — Conclude: State whether crowd stampede or emergency dispersal is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.

prompts.user_prompt:

Step 5 — Conclude: State whether unattended vehicle is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.

Step 5 — Conclude: State whether overcrowding event is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.

prompts.system_instruction: Analyse this surveillance image for evidence of unsecured access point.
prompts.user_prompt: The following image was captured captured from a high angle perspective, in daylight conditions, at a parking facility, during afternoon. Your task is to determine whether a unsecured access point is present. Specifically, look for: Access Gate Left Unsecured. Note the presence or absence of these visual cues: gate_open_position, no_personnel_in_gate_zone, access_control_mechanism_disengaged. If the incident is present, describe its location, the supporting evidence, and the confidence of your assessment.

prompts.system_instruction: Think step by step: is there a altercation or fighting in this image?
prompts.user_prompt:
You are analysing a surveillance feed captured from a high angle perspective, in daylight conditions, at a public plaza, during afternoon, with partial occlusion, crowd density: dense. Work through the following steps:
Step 1 — Identify primary objects: List all security-relevant objects visible.
Step 2 — Match signals: Check for Physical Altercation or Fight.
Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show rapid_limb_motion, contact_between_persons, non_upright_posture?

  5. Note anything that distinguishes this from a normal scene.

prompts.system_instruction: Think step by step: is there a loitering in sensitive area in this image?
prompts.user_prompt:
You are analysing a surveillance feed captured from a high angle perspective, in daylight conditions, at a parking facility, during afternoon. Work through the following steps:
Step 1 — Identify primary objects: List all security-relevant objects visible.
Step 2 — Match signals: Check for Loitering Individual or Group.
Step 3 — Assess attributes: Do the objects show stationary_person, extended_dwell_time, non_purposeful_body_orientation?
Step 4 — Rule out false positives: Could this be person_waiting_for_known_transport, authorised_break_area_usage?
Step 5 — Conclude: State whether loitering in sensitive area is confirmed, probable, uncertain, or absent.

Your task is to determine whether a overcrowding event is present. Specifically, look for: Crowd Density Exceeding Safe Threshold, Rapid Crowd Aggregation. Note the presence or absence of these visual cues: high_person_density, limited_movement_space, overlapping_bounding_boxes, queue_compression. If the incident is present, describe its location, the supporting evidence, and the confidence of your assessment. Some elements may be partially occluded or at an angle.

Describe the bounding region (e.g., 'upper-left quadrant'), the primary object(s) involved, and the key visual attributes that confirm the identification: barrier_deformation_or_opening, person_in_motion_over_barrier, cut_or_bent_material. Note: visibility may be reduced by occlusion, distance or lighting. Report any partial evidence and estimate confidence accordingly.

prompts.system_instruction: Perform chain-of-thought reasoning to answer this visual question.
prompts.user_prompt:
Scene: captured from a high angle perspective, in daylight conditions, at a public plaza, during afternoon, with partial occlusion, crowd density: dense.
Question: Does this scene represent overcrowding event?
Reasoning chain:
  1. What objects/persons are in the foreground?
  2. What are their spatial relationships?
  3. Does the temporal pattern (if observable) match short_term indicators?
  4. Final answer with confidence percentage. Note: visibility may be reduced by occlusion, distance or lighting. Report any partial evidence and estimate confidence accordingly.

prompts.system_instruction: Perform temporal change detection for security monitoring.
prompts.user_prompt: You are presented with a sequence of frames captured captured from a high angle perspective, in daylight conditions, at a public plaza, during afternoon, with partial occlusion, crowd density: dense. Analyse the temporal progression to determine if crowd stampede or emergency dispersal is developing. Look for: velocity_change_between_frames, directionality_reversal. Describe what changes between frames, the rate of change, and whether the pattern is consistent with crowd stampede or emergency dispersal.
